title: Japanese-Style Chicken Skewers
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make recipe for chicken skewers with a Japanese twist. The combination of soy sauce, sake, and mirin creates a savory and slightly sweet glaze.

ingredients.name: nutty rice
ingredients.amount: 1 cup, cooked according to package instructions

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, sake, mirin, sugar, and sesame oil.
Add the chicken pieces to the marinade and mix to coat.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
In a small saucepan, combine the mildly spicy sauce and 2 tablespoons of water.
Bring the sauce to a simmer over medium heat and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
Serve the grilled chicken skewers with the spicy sauce spooned over the top.
Serve with a side of cooked nutty rice and green onions.
